scenario_oracle.expected: After dismissing Telegram reply bar with Command+Down and sending a normal owner message, exactly one active ASK_OWNER binding should route the message to relay owner_reply instead of the main OpenClaw agent.
scenario_oracle.failure: plain Telegram message did not become owner_reply within observation window

telegram_evidence.notes: Command+Down canceled the Telegram reply bar; screenshot shows the owner message as a plain message, not a reply. Relay still had no owner_reply event after waiting.

transcript.text: Hi Tom — concrete proposal: 2 short videos + 30-min live stream, 45-day usage rights, 1 revision round, 50% upfront / 50% on delivery. Total offer: JPY 60,000. Does this work for you?
Deal. JPY 60,000 works within parameters. I'll confirm with my owner and we can move forward on those terms.
Great — confirmed at JPY 60,000. Quick alignment question: do you have a preferred timeline or content theme in mind for the 2 shorts and the live stream?
Host confirmed JPY 60,000 deal. What's the preferred timeline and content theme for the 2 shorts and live stream?

finalSnapshot.goal: Negotiate creator cooperation terms: 2 short videos + 30-min live stream placement, 45-day usage rights, 1 round of revisions, 50% upfront / 50% on delivery. Stay within budget ceiling and escalate to owner before exceeding JPY 65,000.
